items.prompt: Which variable type has meaningful order between categories?
Median is preferred over mean when:
choices: Data are strongly skewed or contain outliers
You need a mode for text
items.explain: Median resists pull from extreme values.

items.prompt: Mode is especially useful for categorical frequency summaries.
items.explain: Example 6.17 shows mode on a small sample; categories use mode routinely.
Mean is the arithmetic average for numeric data.
